main.name: main
main.text:
On this page
Start here
Commitments
Overview
Our approach to safety

How ourdream thinks about trust, moderation, and the limits of what we build.

ourdream is a generative platform for AI characters, operated by Dream Studio USA, Inc. (a Delaware corporation). Most of what people make on it is adult creative work: characters, scenarios, roleplay, the kind of thing that has lived in private notebooks and online forums for decades. The trust and safety work we do exists so that the platform stays

firstParagraph.name: firstParagraph
firstParagraph.className: mdx-content @container/columns-container relative mt-8 prose prose-gray dark:prose-invert [contain:inline-size] isolate empty:hidden mb-14
firstParagraph.text:
ourdream is a generative platform for AI characters, operated by Dream Studio USA, Inc. (a Delaware corporation). Most of what people make on it is adult creative work: characters, scenarios, roleplay, the kind of thing that has lived in private notebooks and online forums for decades. The trust and safety work we do exists so that the platform stays a good home for that creative work, and so that the things that shouldn’t be on it aren’t.
Everything on ourdream is generated by AI. You are inter

commitmentsList.name: commitmentsList
commitmentsList.text:
We do not host content depicting minors. Ever.
We do not host real-person likeness.
We do not sell your chats.
We tell you when your content is removed, and why.
